series.title: Tom Turbo
series.curator_notes: Series not found on Spotify. Extensive searches were conducted for 'Tom Turbo', 'Tom Turbo Retro-Archiv', 'Tom Turbo Junior', 'Tom Turbo Der Fahrrad-Detektiv', 'Tom Turbo Thomas Brezina', and many other variations. The only related artist found was Thomas Brezina (creator), but his profile only contains audiobooks (Knickerbocker4immer series, self-help books), not the Tom Turbo Hörspiel episodes. The series may not be available on Spotify or may be distributed under a different naming convention.

review.notes: Stub: no dedicated Spotify artist. Content exists only under author 'Thomas Brezina' without series-specific tagging.
